title: The Woman in the Window
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A reclusive photographer witnesses a murder through her zoom lens, but the police find no body, no evidence, and the woman in the photograph died twenty years ago.
long_description:
Zoe Cross has not left her apartment in twenty-two years. From her window, she photographs the world she cannot bear to join. One night, through her telephoto lens, she witnesses a violent struggle in the building across the courtyard. A woman in a red dress falls. A shadow stands over her. Zoe calls the police.

Detective Marco Ruiz arrives to find no body, no blood, no signs of struggle. The apartment is pristine. The woman in the photograph matches a database entry for Elena Marchetti -- who died in a car accident twenty years ago. Ruiz is skeptical. The evidence points to delusion or deception. But Zoe knows what she saw.

As Zoe digs deeper, she uncovers a web of lies stretching back two decades: a family secret, a hidden sister, a father who would do anything to keep his daughters close. The woman in the window is real. And she is begging for help before it is too late.

main_characters.name: Zoe Cross
main_characters.description: A reclusive street photographer in her early forties. Agoraphobic for twenty-two years. Observant, isolated, determined.

main_characters.name: Detective Marco Ruiz
main_characters.description: A weary homicide detective nearing retirement. Cynical but fair. Gradually becomes a believer.

main_characters.name: Elena Marchetti
main_characters.description: A woman who supposedly died twenty years ago. Kept prisoner by her father for decades. The original daughter.

main_characters.name: Frank Marchetti
main_characters.description: Elena and Carla's father. A retired restaurateur who has been keeping his daughters captive for decades.

main_characters.name: Carla Marchetti
main_characters.description: Elena's half-sister. Escaped the family and disappeared for years. Holds the key to the truth.

main_characters.name: James Adler
main_characters.description: A true-crime podcaster who investigated the Marchetti case for years. Becomes Zoe's ally.

main_characters.name: Dr. Lydia Thorne
main_characters.description: Zoe's therapist. Monitors her agoraphobia from a careful professional distance.
